sql_array: CREATE TABLE file_sizes (id UInt32, filesize_bytes UInt64);
SELECT id, filesize_bytes, formatReadableSize(filesize_bytes) AS readable_size FROM file_sizes;
UPDATE file_sizes SET filesize_bytes = filesize_bytes * 2 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, formatReadableSize(sum(filesize_bytes)) AS total_size FROM file_sizes GROUP BY id;
